fact: Codex OAuth was re-authenticated on Feb 26 during security review.
Cron delivery mode for platform-health-council and self-improvement jobs was changed from none to both.
Nightly memory extraction timeout increased from 300s to 600s to avoid timeout failures.
Smart-auto-updater skill and references were removed from workspace and MEMORY as cleanup.
Timezone display standard was unified to Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh (GMT+7) across core docs.
OpenClaw Control UI risky flags deviceAuth and hostHeaderOriginFallback were disabled, and openclaw.json permissions were tightened from 644 to 600.
Heartbeat automation was first reduced from 30-minute cadence to 60-minute cadence, then disabled later the same day to stop Telegram spam during market-intel runs.
Market signal delivery routing was corrected to the dedicated Telegram group market-signals (-1003850594375) after allowlist and target-group misconfiguration.
CRITICAL: Config file /data/.openclaw/openclaw.json is owned by root:root with permissions 600, preventing gateway from reading configuration.
pytest is not installed in the container, preventing test execution for autonomous-trading-bot.
Philippe noticed Codex weekly quota dropped significantly. Investigation revealed trading-daily-report cron was still using Codex (default) instead of MiniMax.
Trading-daily-report cron job was switched from default (Codex) to minimax/MiniMax-M2.5 to reduce Codex quota usage.
Nightly memory extraction has failed for 3+ consecutive nights due to path resolution error — cron uses ~/.openclaw/workspace/ but actual path is /data/.openclaw/workspace/.

Health Council and Self-Improvement reports incorrectly flag cron jobs as 'error' when delivery mode is 'none' — jobs actually succeed and deliver to Telegram via announce, but lastDeliveryStatus shows 'not-delivered'.
Morning Meeting protocol standardized: report order security→health→self-improvement, severity ladder, one-item approval loop.
Cron delivery reliability fix: platform-health-council and self-improvement changed to mode:none with extended timeout.
Evidence-pack implementation: market-intel now stores structured verification context and produces model_feedback.json.
Nightly security review ran: found webhook security issues, accepted control flags as INFO.
Trading bot daily report started: 4 signals received, 1 submitted to paper trading.
